_comment: Default config for @vkirill/tencentdb-agent-memory. API keys come from env (OPENROUTER_API_KEY, OPENAI_API_KEY) — never stored here. VOYAGE_API_KEY is supported as a fallback when OPENAI_API_KEY is absent. See claude-mem README for env wiring.

llm._deepseek_v4_flash_comment: deepseek-v4-flash supports response_format and structured_outputs natively, plus 1M context. If quality issue arises on persona generation, fall back to anthropic/claude-sonnet.
